condition: High process–air temp gap collapse + low RPM
action: Stop work; check coolant, radiator, fan belt, and airflow. Do not run under load until temperatures stabilize.
Reduce throttle; inspect fuel delivery, air filter, alternator load, and transmission coupling. Log power trend.
Replace or service worn implement components; reduce draft load; inspect hitch and PTO alignment.

condition: Tool wear in replacement window (200–240 min)
action: Schedule controlled shutdown for tool/implement service; avoid sudden full load.
Run full sensor log capture; check connectors, grounding, and ECU fault codes before returning to field.
Verify hydraulic oil cooler, engine thermostat, and radiator cleanliness.
Continue scheduled maintenance; keep monitoring trends.
